title: Add Tasks
description: Add Yelp search URLs to scrape business listings

content.introduction: Add Yelp search URLs to scrape business listings. The scraper extracts business details including contact information, ratings, reviews, categories, and location data.

rows.description: Hash of your squid configured with the Yelp Search Export crawler
Array of task objects, each containing a `url` field

proTips.content: Perform your search on Yelp first, apply filters (category, location, price range), then copy the URL to preserve all parameters.
Yelp search URLs use `find_desc` for the search term and `find_loc` for the location.

seo.title: Add Tasks - Yelp Search Export - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add Yelp search scraping tasks using the lobstr.io API.
